customer_message: I paid but never got the confirmation email.
case_summary: Customer completed payment successfully but did not receive confirmation email.
resolution_text: Agent confirmed payment succeeded, asked customer to check spam, then re-triggered email successfully.

customer_message: I can't log in to my account.
case_summary: Customer unable to log in with correct credentials.
resolution_text: Cleared browser cache and cookies, customer able to log in successfully.

case_summary: Customer charged twice for one transaction.
resolution_text: Manager reviewed transaction history, identified duplicate charge, and issued full refund to customer account.

case_summary: Customer inquiring about delayed shipment status.
resolution_text: Agent located package stuck in transit, contacted carrier for expedited delivery, customer received tracking update.

case_summary: Customer requested refund due to defective product received.
resolution_text: Processed full refund, sent return shipping label, issue resolved.
